source_pr.title: test: control log level with environment variables
source_pr.body:
<!--

Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?

Problem Summary: We can't change the log level in tests in the past.

### What is changed and how it works?

Add detection for the environment variable `log_level` in each `TestMain()`.

### Check List

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- [ ] Unit test
- [ ] Integration test
- [ ] Manual test (add detailed scripts or steps below)
- [ ] No code

Side effects

- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more CPU
- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more Memory
- [ ] Breaking backward compatibility

Documentation

- [ ] Affects user behaviors
- [ ] Contains syntax changes
- [ ] Contains variable changes
- [ ] Contains experimental features
- [ ] Changes MySQL compatibility

### Release note

<!-- bugfix or new feature needs a release note -->

```release-note
None
```

root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky due to concurrency races or unsynchronized shared state. Asynchronous state transitions need polling/Eventually-style checks. This PR stabilizes it by: - CGO_ENABLED=1 tools/bin/gotestsum --junitfile "$(TEST_COVERAGE_DIR)/tidb-junit-report.xml" -- -v -p $(P) --race \.
